overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a smog-filled Night City street at night. The scene features dense orange atmospheric haze, neon-lit storefronts, and futuristic cyberpunk architecture with heavy pollution reducing visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway transitioning to open commercial street

events.description: exits building overhang into open street with heavy orange smog

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, emerging from under a building overhang into the smog-filled street

notable_agents.action: bald man in white shirt walking toward camera and passing by
group of pedestrians walking along the sidewalk in the distance

entered.detail: futuristic vending machine with glowing green and orange display panels
large digital screen mounted under building overhang displaying advertisements
dark building front with illuminated windows and signage
sparse deciduous trees lining the sidewalk, visible through the haze
tall curved street lamp post with futuristic design

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a building overhang with a futuristic vending machine visible on the right. The character walks forward, emerging from the sheltered area into a smog-filled commercial street. Sparse trees line the left side of the sidewalk, and a few pedestrians are visible through the orange haze. The lighting shifts from artificial neon to mixed ambient as the camera exits the overhang.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial storefronts with dense signage

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past various shops and illuminated neon signs

entered.detail: bright pink neon sign reading 'Sheesha Bar' with vertical text
red neon 'Tobacco' sign and blue 'Open' sign with vertical neon strips
orange neon sign with 'JI-HERO' text and geometric patterns
red neon sign with Japanese characters and 'Fuyutsuki Electronics' text

segments.scene_description: Walking along a medium-width commercial street lined with dense neon signage. The camera passes the Sheesha Bar, a tobacco shop with bright red neon, and the Fuyutsuki Electronics store. The street trees have shifted to the right side of the frame, and the orange smog creates a moody, cyberpunk atmosphere with predominantly artificial neon lighting.

events.description: approaching distinctive corner building with yellow curved roof and green medical cross symbol

agents.ego_description: walking past the pharmacy corner and approaching a pedestrian bridge over the street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the bridge

entered.detail: futuristic building with distinctive curved yellow roof and glowing green cross medical symbol
elevated walkway crossing over the street with glass railings

segments.scene_description: The character walks past a prominent corner pharmacy with a distinctive yellow roof and green medical cross signage. The environment transitions from dense storefronts to a more open area approaching a pedestrian bridge. The street trees remain visible on the right as the camera moves toward and crosses the overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: metro station plaza with large digital displays

events.description: passing over the bridge and approaching the metro station structure on the right

agents.ego_description: walking past the metro station structure with large digital advertisements visible on surrounding buildings

notable_agents.action: man with mustache and earpiece walking past the camera in the opposite direction

entered.detail: large angular transit station building with glass facade and 'CIRR' signage visible
tall building covered with multiple large digital advertisements and neon displays

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wider plaza area after crossing the pedestrian bridge. A large metro station structure dominates the right side with illuminated signage, while massive digital billboards cover the building facades on the left. The vegetation disappears, and the space feels more open despite the persistent orange smog. Pedestrians continue walking along the path as the camera moves past the transit station.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a smog-choked commercial district that gradually opens into a wide, neon-lit transit plaza. It begins under a building overhang beside a futuristic vending machine, moving forward as the character emerges from the shelter into a street filled with dense orange haze and sparse trees. As the camera progresses along the sidewalk, the environment shifts into a corridor of bright neon signage, passing the red glow of the Sheesha Bar and Fuyutsuki Electronics. The scene then transitions past a yellow-roofed pharmacy and across a pedestrian bridge, where the dense storefronts give way to a more open architectural layout. Finally, the view expands into a broad plaza dominated by a massive metro station and towering digital billboards, with the street vegetation disappearing as the camera moves deeper into the urban hub.
